---
title: "nhanes_analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Load Libraries

```{r}
#load libraries
library(haven)
library(here)
```

# Import Data

```{r}
## 2017 - 2018 ##
##Demographic data##
#import
demo_1718 <- read_xpt(here("./Data/Raw_Data/DEMO_J_1718.xpt"))
#save
save(demo_1718, file = here("./Data/Raw_Data/DEMO_J_1718.rda"))

##DEXA data##
#import
dxx_1718 <- read_xpt(here("./Data/Raw_Data/DXX_J_1718.xpt"))
#save
save(dxx_1718, file = here("./Data/Raw_Data/DXX_J_1718.rda"))

##Food security data##
fsq_1718 <- read_xpt(here("./Data/Raw_Data/FSQ_J_1718.xpt"))
#save
save(fsq_1718, file = here("./Data/Raw_Data/FSQ_J_1718.rda"))

##Physical activity data##
paq_1718 <- read_xpt(here("./Data/Raw_Data/PAQY_J_1718.xpt"))
#save
save(paq_1718, file = here("./Data/Raw_Data/PAQY_J_1718.rda"))
```

```{r}
## 2015-2016 ##
##Demographic data##

```

edit
